allow: PowerShell($src = "C:\\MONTAGE VIDEO\\CLAUDE\\SPORT"; $files = @\("index.html","app.js","manifest.json","icon.svg","sw.js","LISEZ-MOI.md"\) | ForEach-Object { Join-Path $src $_ }; $zip = Join-Path $src "monsport-site.zip"; if \(Test-Path $zip\) { Remove-Item $zip -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path $files -DestinationPath $zip -Force; if \(Test-Path $zip\) { "OK -> $zip"; "{0:N0} Ko" -f \(\(Get-Item $zip\).Length/1KB\) })
